name: Curry n' Chutney Cheese Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Place unwrapped packages of cream cheese in a 2-quart glass measuring cup.
2. Microwave on medium (50 percent power) for 2 minutes and 30 seconds.
3. Remove from microwave and stir in the curry powder and sherry.
4. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese and three-quarters of the sliced scallions, mixing well.
5. Spoon the mixture onto a serving platter to form an 8-inch circle, pressing down firmly on the sides to create a tart shape with a well-formed top surface.
6. Puree the chutney until smooth using a blender.
7. Pour the pureed chutney into the center of the cheese tart "well."
8. Chill until firm.
9. To serve, garnish with remaining scallions on top and accompany with crackers.
(Note: The nutritional analysis provided is for informational purposes only.)
